name: Outside world Minamitsu Murasa encounter
description:
This is a simple bot about a Minamitsu that was never saved by Byakuren and therefore never brought to Gensokyo. Since she was never re-socialized by Byakuren, her appearance is considerably different and closer to what one might expect when thinking of a ghost.

The story does not define anything about you or your situation, so you can be a fisherman, a myth hunter, a transatlantic cargo vessel...

Dead dove due to Minamitsu's whole murdering thing.

Image source: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/4844588?
creator: Username4981
